{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320170918565FCC5D446ACCBCDB1A"}"},"total":65},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6998418472371864331","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"亲爱的小可爱们～是时候让我感受一下你们的热情了～互换灵魂这种事一回事二回熟，波斯cp就再也分不开了～欢迎各位小可爱参观指点～五星好评哦亲亲～书架评论催更啥的不要吝啬你们的手指头～感谢各位，感恩的心～"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1629446280,"group_id":"6981685554685414413","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不是为挖坑做准备，就是在填坑的路上。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz9nsUcOu2HKqdHkAptwnws=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7d159eb029c84c22ae588ae14b4db4ca~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776533318&x-signature=swuGZo1b4FhqOR%2Bfd6H%2BWaNJbqk%3D","user_id":"97509490153","user_name":"木浦晓晓"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"97509490153","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1727564137,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6981685554685414413","book_info":{"abstract":"【甜宠+灵魂互换+先婚后爱】
和结婚对象一起逃婚，半路出个车祸就把灵魂给互换了？！
这道题把苏若瑾给整不会了！

互换前的霍岩庭：冷漠！毒舌！腹黑！不近人情！
互换后的霍岩庭：宠妻！宠妻！宠妻！宠妻！

“霍岩庭，等我们换回来的那天，你人设会崩吧？”苏若瑾问。
霍岩庭放下报纸，朝着苏若瑾走去，俯下身道，“不，宠妻这个人设，可以延续。”

首先男女主的初遇都是为了逃婚,互换灵魂后,也是趣事多多,hhhc,好绝。每一次换灵魂,女主都不是在为男主建立宠妻的人设,就是在建立宠妻人设的路上,🌚👍。最后希望两位主角早日相爱?!🌚……,也祝这本书越来越好,就这样叭🌚👏👏"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1629771738,"group_id":"6981685554685414413","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我被高山围绕高山自为我祈祷.","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6b8oCWEXs4XFej1NXeyNzM=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b8c78289cd0147a781efabc11ba43f0f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776534332&x-signature=acTQkQpG9ztzc%2BEYD5nAI%2F4gLro%3D","user_id":"694529631468941","user_name":"难厌."},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"694529631468941","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6981685554685414413","book_info":{"abstract":"【甜宠+灵魂互换+先婚后爱】
